Package com.sap.ai.sdk.orchestration

package com.sap.ai.sdk.orchestration

    Description

    com.sap.ai.sdk.orchestration.spring
     
  • Class
    Description
    AssistantMessage
    Represents a chat message as 'assistant' to the orchestration service.
    AzureContentFilter
    A content filter wrapping Azure Content Safety.
    AzureFilterThreshold
    An Enum wrapping Azure thresholds with readable names.
    ContentFilter
    Interface representing convenience wrappers of serializable content filter that defines thresholds for different content categories.
    ContentItem
    Represents an item in a MessageContent object.
    DpiMasking
    SAP Data Privacy Integration (DPI) can mask personally identifiable information using either anonymization or pseudonymization.
    DpiMasking.Builder
    Builder for creating DPI masking configurations.
    FileItem
    Represents a file item in a MessageContent object.
    Grounding
    Grounding integrates external, contextually relevant, domain-specific, or real-time data into AI processes.
    GroundingProvider
    Interface for grounding configurations.
    ImageItem
    Represents an image item in a MessageContent object.
    ImageItem.DetailLevel
    The detail level of the image.
    LlamaGuardFilter
    A content filter wrapping Llama Guard filter config.
    MaskingProvider
    Interface for masking configurations.
    Message
    Interface representing convenience wrappers of chat message to the orchestration service.
    MessageContent
    Represents the content of a chat message.
    OrchestrationAiModel
    Large language models available in Orchestration.
    OrchestrationAiModel.Parameter<ValueT>
    Parameter key for a model.
    OrchestrationChatCompletionDelta
    Orchestration chat completion output delta for streaming.
    OrchestrationChatResponse
    Orchestration chat completion output.
    OrchestrationClient
    Client to execute requests to the orchestration service.
    OrchestrationClientException
    Exception thrown by the OrchestrationClient in case of an error.
    OrchestrationConfigReference
    Class representing a reference to an Orchestration config stored in prompt registry.
    OrchestrationConfigReference.Builder
    Builder to create an Orchestration config reference from scenario, name, and version.
    OrchestrationConfigReference.Builder1
    Builder to create an Orchestration config reference from scenario, name, and version.
    OrchestrationEmbeddingModel
    Configuration for embedding models in the Orchestration service.
    OrchestrationEmbeddingRequest
    Represents a request for generating embeddings through the SAP AI Core Orchestration service.
    OrchestrationEmbeddingRequest.InputStep
    Builder step for specifying text inputs to embed.
    OrchestrationEmbeddingResponse
    Response wrapper for orchestration embedding operations.
    OrchestrationError
    Orchestration error response.
    OrchestrationError.Streaming
    Orchestration error response for streaming requests.
    OrchestrationError.Synchronous
    Orchestration error response for synchronous requests.
    OrchestrationFilterException
    Base exception for errors occurring during orchestration filtering.
    OrchestrationFilterException.Input
    Exception thrown when an error occurs during input filtering.
    OrchestrationFilterException.Output
    Exception thrown when an error occurs during output filtering, specifically when the finish reason is a content filter.
    OrchestrationJacksonConfiguration
    Internal utility class for getting a default object mapper with preset configuration.
    OrchestrationModuleConfig
    Represents the configuration for the orchestration service.
    OrchestrationPrompt
    Represents a request that can be sent to the orchestration service, containing messages and configuration for the orchestration modules.
    OrchestrationStreamConfig
    Configuration for orchestration streaming options.
    OrchestrationTemplate
    A template to use in OrchestrationModuleConfig.
    OrchestrationTemplateReference
    A reference to a template to use in OrchestrationModuleConfig.
    OrchestrationTemplateReference.ScopeEnum
    Enum representing the scope of the template reference.
    ResponseJsonSchema
    The schema object to use for the response format parameter in OrchestrationTemplate.
    SystemMessage
    Represents a chat message as 'system' to the orchestration service.
    TemplateConfig
    Template configuration for the OrchestrationModuleConfig.
    TemplateConfig.ReferenceBuilder
    Intermediate object to build a template reference.
    TemplateConfig.ReferenceBuilder1
    Intermediate object to build a template reference with the given scenario, name, and version.
    TemplateConfig.ReferenceBuilder2
    Intermediate object to build a template reference with the given scenario, name, and version.
    TextItem
    Represents a text item in a MessageContent object.
    ToolMessage
    Represents a chat message as 'tool' to the orchestration service.
    TranslationConfig
    Configuration helper for SAP Document Translation.
    TranslationConfig.Input
    Input configuration for translation.
    TranslationConfig.Output
    Output configuration for translation.
    TranslationConfig.TemplateRole
    Supported values for items[] when category=template_roles.
    UserMessage
    Represents a chat message as 'user' to the orchestration service.
